summary: High‑quality matrix mix captures a tight late‑80s Dead show with standout Birdsong and The Other One.
review: The recording is praised as an excellent matrix blend of soundboard and audience, delivering a clear “nice seat” listening experience. Fans highlight the first‑set Birdsong and the second‑set The Other One as memorable moments, noting the band’s tight playing typical of their late‑80s era.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 4‑star ratings and highlighted strong musical moments and a well‑executed matrix mix; limited to two reviews, confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear sound with balanced board and crowd blend; described as a “nice seat” experience and very good overall quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Typical late‑80s set, tight playing and entertaining; reviewers felt the band was cohesive and having a blast despite constant touring.
